items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Original leather [New] GG Marmont quilted mini bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, structured body, flap closure, and double G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain allows easy switching between shoulder bag and handbag styles. Burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, antique gold hardware, suede microfiber lining with double G, sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm length) or top handle (30cm length). Also works as a crossbody bag. Spring snap flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
items.name_cn:
💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Original leather [New] GG Marmont quilted mini bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, structured body, flap closure, and double G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain allows easy switching between shoulder bag and handbag styles. Burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, antique gold hardware, suede microfiber lining with double G, sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm length) or top handle (30cm length). Also works as a crossbody bag. Spring snap flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
Model: 443497.
Dimensions: 26(W) x 13(H) x 6cm(D)
Color: Burgundy/original leather.
Made in Italy
Model height: 177cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, AirPods, small wallet, and lipstick

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green gift bag💖Gucci Blondie series large tote bag. The circular interlocking double-G, a heritage design of the brand, is masterfully interpreted in the Gucci Blondie series. This Gucci Blondie series tote bag is masterfully crafted from brown suede, featuring a handle and chain shoulder strap design, and reinterpreting the brand's heritage with gold-tone accessories, showcasing the extraordinary charm of a classic piece. Brown suede

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original retail packaging💖【New Arrival】Miu Miu's new best-selling bowling bag, made with top-tier vintage soft nappa leather, vintage matte-finish aged metal hardware. Inspired by Miu Miu's archival pieces, this Aventure Nappa tote has been restructured to be lighter and exudes a fresh personality, creating a classic style with timeless charm. The multi-element design gives this tote a unique aesthetic and classic vibe. Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, canvas lining with zip pocket and slip pocket. Model: 5bb168. Dimensions: 33(L) x 16.5(W) x 10cm(H). Color: Brown/Original Leather

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Extra Mini Bag
items.name_cn:
💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Extra Mini Bag
A shoulder bag from the Early Autumn Selection series, perfect for creating daily looks. Practical items are reinterpreted with a modern aesthetic philosophy, adorned with the classic interlocking G pattern. This extra mini bag is crafted in beige and blue classic GG canvas and leather, featuring an open pocket and an adjustable shoulder strap.
Beige and blue classic GG canvas and leather
Silver-tone hardware
Classic GG canvas lining
Exterior: one open pocket
Removable adjustable shoulder strap (55cm long)
Magnetic snap closure
Weight: approx. 0.47kg
Made in Italy
Model: 795213
Dimensions: 13(L) x 20(W) x 5cm(H)
Color: Blue canvas/Original leather
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Extra Mini Shoulder Bag. The initials of founder Guccio Gucci's name embellish leather accessories, blending modern small leather goods with Gucci's deep design heritage. The textured and glossy classic GG pattern adds a unique touch to this elegant light beige mini shoulder bag. Light beige GG leather, cotton-linen blend lining, inside: one leather open pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (50cm high), magnetic closure.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Milano Mini Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Milano Mini Shoulder Bag
During Milan Fashion Week, the GG Milano handbag, created by Brand Creative Director Sabato De Sarno, debuted at the 2024 Fall/Winter Fashion Week, paying tribute to Milan, the city that inspired the design. This handbag features a new double-G motif, crafted from soft and smooth quilted fluffy leather. The chain strap adds styling versatility, easily creating a shoulder or crossbody look.
White fluffy leather
Glossy light gold-tone hardware
White leather lining
Double-G
D-ring buckle
One zip pocket with GG charm, one open pocket, and one lipstick organizer
Handle height 6.1 cm
Removable chain shoulder strap (approx. 50 cm)
Spring clip
Weight: approx. 0.5 kg
Model: 806017
Dimensions: 21(L) x 12.5(W) x 4.6(H)
Color: White full leather / Original leather
Italian creation

specs.rawTitle:
💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Milano Mini Shoulder Bag
During Milan Fashion Week, the GG Milano handbag, created by Brand Creative Director Sabato De Sarno, debuted at the 2024 Fall/Winter Fashion Week, paying tribute to Milan, the city that inspired the design. This handbag features a new double-G motif, crafted from soft and smooth quilted fluffy leather. The chain strap adds styling versatility, easily creating a shoulder or crossbody look.
White fluffy leather
Glossy light gold-tone hardware
White leather lining
Double-G
D-ring buckle
One zip pocket with GG charm, one open pocket, and one lipstick organizer
Handle height 6.1 cm
Removable chain shoulder strap (approx. 50 cm)
Spring clip
Weight: approx. 0.5 kg
Model: 806017
Dimensions: 21(L) x 12.5(W) x 4.6(H)
Color: White full leather / Original leather
Italian creation

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Small Bucket Shoulder Bag. This small bucket shoulder bag is crafted in black leather. This accessory features a hook closure and a webbing shoulder strap design, cleverly blending functionality and modernity. Black leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, red and green webbing strap, cotton-linen blend lining, inside: 2 main compartments and 1 zip pocket, with Gucci badge zip puller, adjustable shoulder strap (39.5cm high) Weight: approx. 0.9kg.
items.name_cn:

Model: 782904.
Dimensions: 25.5 x 28 x 16.5cm.
Color: Black/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Model height 177cm
Max fits: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods headphones, long wallet and lipstick

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Super Mini Shoulder Bag. The initials of founder Guccio Gucci add a touch of elegance to leather goods, blending modern small leather goods with Gucci's rich design heritage. The richly textured and glossy classic GG pattern adds a unique touch to this elegant light purple mini shoulder bag. Light purple GG leather, cotton-linen blend lining, inside: one leather open pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (50cm high) magnetic snap closure.
